X/Y Sprite Project.license_text: These sprites are free for non-profit use. You must make a credit page and link back to this thread. Any games that charge money will not be accepted as a rule. If you only using a few sprites we appreciate you crediting the individual spriters. Please do not redistribute these sprites as it gives the false impression you created all of them.

Sun/Moon Sprite Project.license_text: These sprites are also free for use as long as the spriter or the project itself is credited. For the sake of transparency, these sprites are free for non-profit use.

msikma/pokesprite (40x30 box icons upstr.license_text: MIT License (code). Sprites themselves are © Nintendo / Creatures Inc. / GAME FREAK Inc. Pokémon HOME 3D models (dex style).license_text: No public license. Used as official game art for non-commercial reference inside a free fan tool. Same posture as the box icons.

Pokémon Showdown Trainer Sprites.license_text: Trainer avatars under assets/trainers/ are bundled from the Pokémon Showdown client repository (MIT-licensed code at github.com/smogon/pokemon-showdown-client). The sprites themselves depict characters owned by Nintendo / Game Freak / The Pokémon Company and were contributed by the Smogon community. Used here only as user-selectable trainer-card avatars for a non-profit damage calculator with no commercial redistribution. Credit and attribution to the original contributors via the linked repository.
